runTitle: Vercel complementary release-gate QA - advanced AI surfaces after v8.11.26 release
coveredSurfaces: AI Chat positive feedback submission locks response evaluation controls
/api/ai/feedback request observed from browser performance entries
Reporter Agent first report generation from empty state
Reporter detail view renders anomaly, related server, recommendation, pattern, and postmortem sections
Analyst Agent full-system analysis completes for 18 servers
Analyst result surface renders current state, one-hour prediction, and AI insight sections
browser console error count 0 with preload-only warnings during advanced AI flow

expertAssessments.rationale: The previously skipped advanced AI paths were exercised end-to-end on the promoted production deployment, including feedback submission, Reporter detail rendering, and Analyst drilldown results.
The browser session stayed free of runtime console errors during the advanced AI walkthrough; residual browser noise was limited to duplicate CSS preload warnings.
This complementary run filled the remaining advanced AI coverage gap without re-running already covered auth or broad route scenarios.

usageChecks.summary: vercel usage --format json --non-interactive reviewed before complementary advanced AI release-gate QA; effective usage was 14.3807 USD while billed amount remained 0.0000 USD.

artifacts.label: Advanced AI feedback flow after positive submission

notes: The AI Chat positive feedback control submitted successfully, disabled both feedback buttons, and produced a browser resource entry for /api/ai/feedback (duration 1991ms, transfer size 597).
Reporter Agent started from empty state and generated one incident report titled 디스크 사용량 경고: 데이터베이스 서버 과부하 before rendering the full detail view.
Reporter detail rendered 감지된 이상 항목, 연관 서버, 권장 조치, 감지된 패턴, Postmortem, and 로그 타임라인 보기 without route navigation.
Analyst Agent full-system analysis completed for 18 servers and rendered server-level detail cards with 현재 상태, 1시간 후 예측, and AI 인사이트 sections.
Browser console messages ended with 0 errors and 10 warnings; all warnings were duplicate CSS preload notices for /_next/static/chunks/13c1ca927ab84bf9.css, not runtime failures.
